framework.name: Agent Operation Authorization (Liu/Zhu/Krishnan draft-02)
framework.description: Alibaba+Cisco individual I-D proposing two-phase JWT flow: agent proposes operations via PAR, AS issues operation-scoped authorization token. Uses OPA/Rego for policy, WIMSE workload identity tokens for agent identity. Section 6 explicitly addresses agent-to-agent delegation with trust chain preservation.
framework.raw_quote: The agent_workload_token identifies the running agent workload. Unless otherwise specified, it SHOULD be a Workload Identity Token (WIT) as defined in [I-D.ietf-wimse-workload-creds]. Deployments that already use other workload identity mechanisms (such as SPIFFE SVID) MAY map those tokens into this field.
